channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Over 125 million Americans face dangerous heat nationwide
item.description: Cities in North Dakota, South Dakota, and Minnesota set daily heat records on Monday.

item.title: Man killed by ICE in Maine was not target of warrant, lawmakers say
item.description: Senator Angus King stated he urged Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin to ensure a transparent investigation into the Biddeford shooting.

item.title: Climbers found dead in Italian Alps a week after vanishing
item.description: The two climbers had not been heard from since leaving a mountain refuge on July 9, authorities said.

item.title: WATCH: Boat rescue unfolds as reporter records nearby story
item.description: The rescue occurred on an Idaho river while a local reporter was filming a news segment just feet away.
